nodes.name: command
nodes.responsibility: Command parsing, AST generation, and semantic analysis for shell commands

nodes.name: zterm_completer
nodes.responsibility: Shell command and argument completion with context-aware suggestions

nodes.name: syntax_tree
nodes.responsibility: Generic tree data structure for representing syntax and language structures

nodes.name: command parser
nodes.responsibility: Parse shell command strings into executable command structures

nodes.name: AST generation
nodes.responsibility: Build abstract syntax trees for shell commands

nodes.name: completion engine
nodes.responsibility: Context-aware command and argument completion logic

nodes.name: suggestion provider
nodes.responsibility: Generate completion suggestions from available commands/files/environment

nodes.name: Tree
nodes.responsibility: Generic tree node structure for language parsing

hyperedges.name: Command Processing Pipeline
hyperedges.responsibility: Transform raw shell input into structured, analyzable AST

hyperedges.name: Completion System
hyperedges.responsibility: Provide intelligent shell command and argument completions

design_patterns.rationale: command_parser handles syntax; ast_module handles semantics and structure
syntax_tree provides reusable tree abstraction for multiple parsers
completion_engine parses partial input to understand context before suggesting

implicit_dependencies.description: Completion needs command parsing to understand context
Both parse shell input; completion may reuse parser logic

architectural_rationale.separate_parsing: Decoupling parsing from completion enables reuse of parser in other contexts
architectural_rationale.generic_tree: syntax_tree provides foundation for language-agnostic AST representation
architectural_rationale.context_awareness: Completion engine must understand partial commands to provide relevant suggestions
